QuickBooksListId.description: Stable QuickBooks Desktop item ListID/item hex. Use this for QBD matching; QuickBooks SKU/name may change for operational sorting.

WaitlistEnabled.description: Whether the storefront may collect back-in-stock requests for this product when Medusa inventory is zero. Set false for seasonal inactive, discontinued, or internal-only items.

AvailabilityLifecycle.description: Customer catalog lifecycle separate from inventory quantity. Use active for normal sellable items; seasonal_inactive for off-season Passover items that should not accept waitlist requests.
